---
title: "24_ESR_plots"
output: html_document
date: "2025-07-23"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(cowplot)
```


Read in timeseries that were generated from the VAST model runs in 24_VAST_Runs
```{r}
forage <- read.csv("2025-07-22/Forage complex/2025-07-22_Surface_ForageComplex_NBS_D.csv") %>% dplyr::select(-c(X, Year.1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(forage_kgkm2 = mean,
                forage_sd = SD)
herring <- read.csv("2025-07-22/Pacific_Herring/2025-07-22_Surface_Herring_NBS_D.csv") %>% dplyr::select(-c(X, Year.1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(herring_kgkm2 = mean,
                herring_sd = SD)
pollock <- read.csv("2025-07-22/Pollock_age0/2025-07-22_Surface_Pollock0_NBS_D.csv") %>% dplyr::select(-c(X, Year.1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(pollock_kgkm2 = mean,
                pollock_sd = SD)
capelin <- read.csv("2025-07-23/Capelin/2025-07-23_Surface_Capelin_NBS_D.csv") %>% dplyr::select(-c(X, Year.1)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(capelin_kgkm2 = mean,
                capelin_sd = SD)

NBS.sample.size <- read.csv("NBS_updated_sample_size_2024.csv") %>%
  dplyr::select(-X) %>% dplyr::rename(n = n..)
```

```{r}
vast.ts <- forage %>%
  left_join(herring, by = "Year") %>%
  left_join(pollock, by = "Year") %>%
  left_join(capelin, by = "Year") %>%
  left_join(NBS.sample.size, by = c("Year" = "sample_year")) %>%
  complete(Year = 2003:2024) %>%
  mutate(forage_se = forage_sd/sqrt(n),
         herring_se = herring_sd/sqrt(n),
         pollock_se = pollock_sd/sqrt(n),
         capelin_se = capelin_sd/sqrt(n))
```


# Forage plot
```{r}
forage.plot <- ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = forage_kgkm2), data = vast.ts) +
  geom_point(size=2)+
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = forage_kgkm2 - forage_se, ymax = forage_kgkm2 + forage_se), width=.1, 
                position=position_dodge(0.05)) +
  theme_cowplot(12)+
  ylab(bquote("CPUE (kg/"* ~ km^2*')'))+
  labs(title="Forage complex - Late Summer/Fall Surface Trawl Surveys", x="Year", cex=3)+
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "black", linewidth=1))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 650)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values=c('#003366','#0099CC'))+
  geom_point(size=1)
#grid.arrange(p,bottom="",top="",left="",nrow = 1, ncol=1)

forage.plot
```

# pollock plot
```{r}
pollock.plot <- ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = pollock_kgkm2), data = vast.ts) +
  geom_point(size=2)+
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = pollock_kgkm2 - pollock_se, ymax = pollock_kgkm2 + pollock_se), width=.1, 
                position=position_dodge(0.05)) +
  theme_cowplot(12)+
  ylab(bquote("CPUE (kg/"* ~ km^2*')'))+
  labs(title="Age-0 Pollock - Late Summer/Fall Surface Trawl Surveys", x="Year", cex=3)+
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "black", linewidth=1))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 225)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values=c('#003366','#0099CC'))+
  geom_point(size=1)
#grid.arrange(p,bottom="",top="",left="",nrow = 1, ncol=1)

pollock.plot
```

# Herring plot
```{r}
herring.plot <- ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = herring_kgkm2), data = vast.ts) +
  geom_point(size=2)+
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = herring_kgkm2 - herring_se, ymax = herring_kgkm2 + herring_se), width=.1, 
                position=position_dodge(0.05)) +
  theme_cowplot(12)+
  ylab(bquote("CPUE (kg/"* ~ km^2*')'))+
  labs(title="Pacific herring - Late Summer/Fall Surface Trawl Surveys", x="Year", cex=3)+
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "black", linewidth=1))+
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 200)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values=c('#003366','#0099CC'))+
  geom_point(size=1)
#grid.arrange(p,bottom="",top="",left="",nrow = 1, ncol=1)

herring.plot
```

```{r}
caplin.plot <- ggplot(aes(x = Year, y = capelin_kgkm2), data = vast.ts) +
  geom_point(size=2)+
  geom_line()+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = capelin_kgkm2 - capelin_se, ymax = capelin_kgkm2 + capelin_se), width=.1, 
                position=position_dodge(0.05)) +
  theme_cowplot(12)+
  ylab(bquote("CPUE (kg/"* ~ km^2*')'))+
  labs(title="Capelin - Late Summer/Fall Surface Trawl Surveys", x="Year", cex=3)+
  theme(legend.position = "right",
        axis.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        panel.background = element_rect(colour = "black", linewidth=1))+
  #scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 15)) +
  #scale_color_manual(values=c('#003366','#0099CC'))+
  geom_point(size=1)
#grid.arrange(p,bottom="",top="",left="",nrow = 1, ncol=1)

caplin.plot
```


```{r}
year <- 2024
ggsave(paste0("2025-07-22/", year, "_Fall_Herring_timeseries.png"), herring.plot)
ggsave(paste0("2025-07-22/", year, "_Fall_Pollock_timeseries.png"), pollock.plot)
ggsave(paste0("2025-07-22/", year, "_Fall_Forage_timeseries.png"), forage.plot)
ggsave(paste0("2025-07-23/", year, "_Fall_Capelin_timeseries.png"), caplin.plot)
```
